name: Windows-in-Codespace
postCreateCommand: docker-compose up -d && curl -L -o cloudflared.deb https://github.com/cloudflare/cloudflared/releases/latest/download/cloudflared-linux-amd64.deb && sudo dpkg -i cloudflared.deb && rm cloudflared.deb && nohup cloudflared tunnel --url http://localhost:8006 > /tmp/tunnel.log 2>&1 & sleep 20 && URL=$(grep -o -E 'https://[a-zA-Z0-9-]+\.trycloudflare\.com' /tmp/tunnel.log | head -n 1) && if [ ! -z "$URL" ]; then echo "$URL" > public_url.txt && git config --global user.email "bot@ziploot.com" && git config --global user.name "Ziploot Bot" && git add public_url.txt && git commit -m "update public URL [skip ci]" && git push origin main; fi
